title: Handling retriable and non-retriable pod failures with Pod failure policy — Alternatives
text:
You could rely solely on the
Pod backoff failure policy
,
by specifying the Job's
.spec.backoffLimit
field. However, in many situations
it is problematic to find a balance between setting a low value for
.spec.backoffLimit
to avoid unnecessary Pod retries, yet high enough to make sure the Job would
not be terminated by Pod disruptions.
